description_long: This is a sealed, rectangular plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Okra, featuring a vibrant front design with a red and white Faragello logo at the top and a bowl of cut green okra pieces prominently displayed below. The front also includes bilingual labeling in English and Arabic, with the product name and a green accent. The back of the package displays detailed nutritional facts and ingredient information in multiple languages, as well as recycling and certification icons. The sides of the bag are narrow and show partial graphics and text, with one side including a list of languages and the other showing a continuation of the front and back designs. The overall color scheme is white with green okra imagery and red branding elements. The bag appears to be filled with frozen okra pieces, giving it a slightly puffy, soft appearance.
description: A white and green plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Okra with a red logo, okra imagery, and detailed nutritional labeling on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Faragello logo, product name in English and Arabic, and a bowl of cut green okra pieces.
description_view_1: The left side view is narrow, displaying partial graphics and a list of languages, with minimal product imagery.
description_view_2: The back view features nutritional facts, ingredient information in multiple languages, and recycling icons.
description_view_3: The right side view is also narrow, showing a continuation of the front and back designs with some okra imagery.
attribute_brand_logo: A red and white Faragello logo is visible on the front and back, featuring a stylized 'F' and the brand name in bold letters.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front shows images of cut green okra and the text 'Frozen OKRA', indicating the product is plain frozen okra.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories and other nutritional information.
